metadata.siteTitle: Bit by Bit Run — race, eat, sprint, win sats
metadata.description: A free, lightweight, web-based multiplayer runner race. Grab the good food to sprint, dodge the junk, and be first to the finish line.

landing.title: Bit by Bit Run
landing.subtitle: Race down the track. Grab the good food to sprint, dodge the junk or you'll be sent back to the start. First to the finish wins.
landing.tagline:
Run, Eat, Win 🏃💨
Cardio never paid this well.

demo.title: Demo
demo.finishText: Sign in to compete with others and earn zaps ⚡

bathrooms: 🚽 Too much beer! Off you go...
🚽 Come back when the block clears
signs:
TAXATION IS THEFT,
CARDIO IS FREEDOM

RUN LIKE THE STATE
IS CHASING YOU

NOT A RUG PULL,
KEEP GOING!

FIAT IS FOR
THOSE WHO WALK

DON'T STOP,
NOT EVEN FOR THE FED

EVERY STEP IS
ONE MORE SAT

howToPlay.title: How to play
howToPlay.intro: Race down the 8-lane athletics track and be the first to cross the finish line.
howToPlay.goalText: Reach the finish line before everyone else. Crossing first locks in the top spot.
howToPlay.energyText: Grab good food to fill your energy bar, then spend it to sprint. The better the food, the more energy and points:
howToPlay.poisonText: Dodge junk food: it fills your poison bar and, if it fills up, you run to the bathroom 🚽 and start over. The worse it is, the more it costs you:
howToPlay.zapText: When the race ends, you can send sat zaps to the winner. Running fast pays out in Bitcoin.
howToPlay.rankingText: Your position when you cross the finish sets your place in the ranking. Climb it race after race.

login.title: Sign in with Nostr
login.subtitle: Sign in to save your runs and race under your own identity.
login.extensionDescription: Nostr WoT, Alby, nos2x or another extension
login.nsecWarning: Your private key should never leave your device. Only paste it on trusted sites, and consider using a Nostr extension instead.
login.nsecAcceptRisk: I understand the risk and want to paste my key in this browser.
login.no_extension: No Nostr extension detected in this browser.
login.nostr_signing_rejected: You cancelled the signature. Try again whenever you're ready.
login.nsecInvalidKey: That doesn't look like a valid key. Check the format (nsec1… or 64 hex chars).
login.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
login.error: We could not sign you in. Try again in a moment.
login.createIdentityDescription: Generate a fresh Nostr identity in one click
login.createdIntro: We generated a new Nostr key for you. Save it before you continue — without it you cannot sign back in.
login.createdWarning: If you lose this key, you lose access to your account. Don't share it with anyone.
login.createdAckLabel: I saved my key somewhere safe.
login.connectScanModalIntro: Open Amber, nsec.app, or any NIP-46 compatible signer and scan this QR.
login.connectAppDescription: Amber, Primal or another NIP-46 signer
login.connectAppModalIntro: Tap below to open your signer (Amber, Primal, nsec.app) and approve the connection.
login.connectSlowHint: Still waiting? Open your signer (Amber, nsec.app, Damus) and approve the request.
login.connectQrAlt: QR code to connect your Nostr signer
login.connectBunkerModalIntro: Paste the bunker:// URL from your remote signer (or a NIP-05 like user@domain).
login.connectApproveInSigner: Approve the connection in your signer
login.connectCompatible: Compatible with Amber, nsec.app, Keychat, nsecBunker and more.
login.connectError: We couldn't connect to your signer. Try again.
login.connectInvalidBunker: That bunker:// URL doesn't look valid.

reSignIn.mismatch: That key doesn't match your current session.

errors.network: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.

fakeAds.gagDisclaimer: This was a fake ad. No sats were harmed.

cloud-seed.title: Back up your seed to the cloud ☁️✅

elon-giveaway.title: Elon is giving away BTC LIVE 🔴

wallet-airdrop.title: Connect your wallet to the airdrop 🪂

quantum-safe.title: Quantum is coming for your BTC! 🛡️

free-bitcoin.headline: You won 1 BTC… the fake kind 🎈
free-bitcoin.body: Congrats, you just claimed exactly 0 satoshis. Your prize is this free lesson: if it looks too good to be true, it's a scam.

hot-zaps.headline: The singles were bots ⚡🤖
hot-zaps.body: The only zaps you'll be sending are to your own notes. Still, good practice.

cloud-seed.headline: Never upload your seed to the cloud 🙅
cloud-seed.body: If someone offers to 'back up your seed phrase for you', they're after your money. Not your keys, not your coins.

lambo-90-days.headline: The only lambo is cardio 🏃
lambo-90-days.body: We don't give away cars here. But if you run in the game, at least you'll burn the calories of an imaginary lambo.

browser-miner.headline: All you mined was your battery 🔋
browser-miner.body: Those 'browser miners' just cook your laptop. Real Bitcoin isn't mined with a click.

sat-faucet.headline: The faucet was dry 🚰
sat-faucet.body: 4587 clicks later… zero sats. But hey, good exercise for your finger.

double-btc.headline: Spoiler: nobody doubles your BTC 💸
double-btc.body: The oldest trick in the book. Send 1 BTC and you get exactly nothing back. Keep your coins.

scarcity-21m.headline: Yes, there are 21 million. Forever. 🪙
scarcity-21m.body: Scarcity is real, the urgency is fake. Nobody is going to 'take' your spot. Breathe.

elon-giveaway.headline: Elon doesn't know you 🚀
elon-giveaway.body: No billionaire doubles your BTC on a stream. Send coins to that 'official address' and they're gone for good.

shitcoin-1000x.headline: 1000x… straight down 📉
shitcoin-1000x.body: The only guaranteed shitcoin is the one that leaves you with nothing. Stick to bitcoin and sleep well.

nft-rare.headline: The JPG is still free with right-click 🖱️
nft-rare.body: You paid for the 'right' to a link that can die tomorrow. The art is nice; the urgency isn't.

wallet-airdrop.headline: You connected your wallet to nothing 🕳️
wallet-airdrop.body: Those 'airdrops' that ask you to connect and sign are wallet drainers. Never sign what you don't understand.

telegram-signals.headline: The only signal was 'run' 🏃
telegram-signals.body: 'Signal' groups make money selling you the entry, not trading. Alpha isn't sold in a Telegram.

lightning-yield.headline: Your Lightning node isn't a bank ⚡
lightning-yield.body: Anyone promising magic yield on your sats is playing with your money. Not your node, not your rules.

nostr-verify.headline: Nostr has no blue check — that's the point 🟣
nostr-verify.body: Nobody 'verifies' you on Nostr. Your identity is your keys, not a badge someone sells you.

mining-rig.headline: The rig shipped without the chips 🪫
mining-rig.body: 'Unmissable' mining deals are usually empty boxes or prepaid scams. If it's too cheap, it's smoke.

quantum-safe.headline: Your BTC isn't in quantum danger today 🛡️
quantum-safe.body: Quantum fear is the new excuse to make you move your coins to a 'safe' wallet someone else controls. Relax.

btc-pizza.headline: That pizza got really expensive 🍕
btc-pizza.body: A nod to Bitcoin Pizza Day: in 2010 someone paid 10,000 BTC for 2 pizzas. Moral: think twice before spending your sats.

fallback.headline: You fell for it anyway 🎣
fallback.body: We're not sure which ad you clicked, but it brought you here. Lesson learned: on the internet, be suspicious of shiny banners.

notFound.title: You ran off the track 🏁
notFound.body: This page sprinted away and we couldn't catch it. Head back home before the State finds you.

form.signRequiredBody: This action requires an additional signature from your Nostr signer.
